role_cards.briefing: Ms. Chen's arrival is delayed approximately 90 minutes — revised ETA 5:30 PM. Suite hold is unchanged; adjust the welcome timing silently. Do not call or message her during transit. Have everything ready; she knows.
priority_actions: Confirm garden-view King suite is ready and pre-cooled
Have still water and a light fruit plate in the room on arrival
Notify Asaya Spa: Thursday 4 PM hold released — delay makes it unlikely
Bluejay Bikes Friday 6:30 AM — confirm with Concierge before 3 PM
suppressed: Flamingo Estate Tea (social, wrong arrival mood)
Any arrival activity push — she arrives fatigued and later than planned

role_cards.briefing: Delay does not affect Friday morning cycling plan. Bluejay Bikes is still confirmed for 6:30 AM Friday. Thursday evening is now very short — Ridge Rosé Reveal can be offered but keep it brief and low-key. She may simply want dinner and sleep.
priority_actions: Bluejay Bikes Friday 6:30 AM — confirm with Front Desk before 3 PM
Prepare a printed route card for Old La Honda Road and the Portola Valley loop
Ridge Rosé Reveal tonight: brief and low-key — 45 minutes max, not a full evening
Hold a quiet Madera table for 7:30 PM Thursday dinner

role_cards.briefing: Thursday 4 PM hold is released due to the delay. Asaya Thursday is off the table. If Ms. Chen asks about spa access on arrival, offer the outdoor garden walk-in only — no booked treatment tonight. Hold a Friday 9:30 AM recovery slot post-cycling.
priority_actions: Release Thursday 4 PM Asaya hold — delay makes it unavailable
Offer outdoor garden access with no treatment required
Hold a Friday 9:30 AM recovery treatment slot post-cycling
suppressed: Any Thursday booked treatment — not feasible with the delayed arrival

role_cards.briefing: Revised dinner timing: hold a quiet Madera garden table for 7:30 PM Thursday given the late arrival. Friday breakfast unchanged. Ridge Rosé Reveal available Thursday evening at low intensity — 45 minutes maximum, not the extended tasting format.
priority_actions: In-suite breakfast Friday 7:00 AM (FT, WSJ, New Yorker alongside)
Brief wine team on Ridge Rosé Reveal — guest has Brunello-level terroir knowledge
Madera garden table held for 7:30 PM Thursday (delayed arrival timing)
suppressed: Flamingo Estate Tea (social grouping, wrong for this guest)
Extended wine tasting Thursday evening — delay means she arrives fatigued

role_cards.briefing: Turndown adjusted to 8:00 PM given later arrival. Friday morning in-suite breakfast unchanged. No interruptions after 9 PM.
priority_actions: Turndown service by 8:00 PM Thursday (adjusted — delay moves window later)
In-suite breakfast Friday 7:00 AM — quiet knock, leave tray
Ensure the room is quiet: no hallway noise Thursday night

role_cards.briefing: Delay-adjusted plan: the cycling and wine thread remain intact; Thursday evening is compressed to quiet landing mode. The handwritten note should acknowledge the long travel day without referencing the delay specifically.
priority_actions: Bluejay Bikes Friday 6:30 AM — ensure Concierge has confirmed before 3 PM Thursday
Have Ridge Rosé Reveal available Thursday evening — no reservation required, walk-up welcome
Handwritten note: acknowledge long travel day — do not mention the delay
suppressed: Any reference to her prior stays in spoken conversation (note it, don't announce it)

suppression: Any Thursday evening programming beyond quiet dinner and optional 45-minute Ridge Rosé Reveal
References to the flight delay in direct guest interaction
guest_message: Welcome to Rosewood, Ms. Chen — we hope the journey wasn't too rough. Your garden suite is ready. A quiet table at Madera is held for 7:30 if you'd like dinner, and the Ridge Rosé is available whenever you're settled. Tomorrow morning: Bluejay Bikes is confirmed for 6:30 AM and your route card is at the desk. Rest well.
